name: Will Marshall
background: Dr. Marshall is a co-founder of Planet and has served as our Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our board of directors since December 2010. Prior to Planet, Dr. Marshall was a Scientist at NASA Ames Research Center from 2005 to 2010. Dr. Marshall holds a Ph.D. in Physics from the University of Oxford and a B.A. in Physics from the University of Leicester.

company_affiliations.name: Planet Labs PBC
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Co-Founder, Chief Executive Officer, and Chairperson of the Board
